$comment: Settings contract: keys, types, defaults, labels, descriptions, and CSS-var bindings. Read by Rust (apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/config.rs) via include_str! and by the frontend via a static import (lib/settings-schema.ts). Theme preset *values* are not part of the contract — they live in shared/themes/*.json, one file per preset. Per docs/consolidation.md: do not declare defaults, labels, or types anywhere else.

settings.label: Font Size
settings.description: Font size in pixels for the editor

settings.label: Line Height
settings.description: Line height multiplier for the editor

settings.label: Tab Size
settings.description: Number of spaces per tab

settings.label: Schema
settings.description: Light or dark color schema

settings.label: Sidebar Width
settings.description: Default sidebar width in pixels

settings.label: Sidebar Visible
settings.description: Show the sidebar by default

settings.label: Sidebar File Label
settings.description: Show the document title or the filename for files in the sidebar

settings.label: Editor Width
settings.description: Editor content width mode

settings.label: Preset
settings.description: Light theme preset
settings.$comment: Valid values are populated at runtime from shared/themes/*.json plus the special "custom" sentinel; we intentionally don't enum-constrain the contract so adding a preset doesn't require a schema edit.

settings.label: Accent
settings.description: Light theme accent color

settings.label: Background
settings.description: Light theme background color

settings.label: Foreground
settings.description: Light theme foreground color

settings.label: UI font
settings.description: Light theme UI font stack
settings.default: -apple-system-body, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, system-ui, "Segoe UI", Helvetica, "Apple Color Emoji", Arial, sans-serif, "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

settings.label: Editor font
settings.description: Light theme editor body font stack
settings.default: -apple-system-body, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, system-ui, "Segoe UI", Helvetica, "Apple Color Emoji", Arial, sans-serif, "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

settings.label: Translucent
settings.description: Light theme translucency (0 = solid, 100 = max).

settings.label: Contrast
settings.description: alpha multiplier on borders, cards, hover bgs.

settings.label: Preset
settings.description: Dark theme preset
settings.$comment: Valid values are populated at runtime from shared/themes/*.json plus the special "custom" sentinel; we intentionally don't enum-constrain the contract so adding a preset doesn't require a schema edit.

settings.label: Accent
settings.description: Dark theme accent color

settings.label: Background
settings.description: Dark theme background color

settings.label: Foreground
settings.description: Dark theme foreground color

settings.label: UI font
settings.description: Dark theme UI font stack
settings.default: -apple-system-body, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, system-ui, "Segoe UI", Helvetica, "Apple Color Emoji", Arial, sans-serif, "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

settings.label: Editor font
settings.description: Dark theme editor body font stack
settings.default: -apple-system-body, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, system-ui, "Segoe UI", Helvetica, "Apple Color Emoji", Arial, sans-serif, "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol"

settings.label: Translucent
settings.description: Dark theme translucency (0 = solid, 100 = max).

settings.label: Contrast
settings.description: alpha multiplier on borders, cards, hover bgs.

settings.label: File Associations
settings.description: File patterns to include in the workspace

settings.label: Default Encoding
settings.description: Default text encoding for files

settings.label: Insert Final Newline
settings.description: Ensure files end with a newline when saving

settings.label: Trim Trailing Whitespace
settings.description: Remove trailing whitespace from lines when saving

settings.label: Restore Open Files
settings.description: Reopen previously open files when opening a workspace

settings.label: Max Recent Workspaces
settings.description: Maximum number of recent workspaces to remember

settings.label: Restore Workspace
settings.description: Automatically reopen the last workspace when the app starts

settings.label: Search Debounce
settings.description: Delay in milliseconds before performing search

settings.label: Max Search Results
settings.description: Maximum number of search results to return

settings.label: Read-Aloud Voice
settings.description: macOS system voice used for read-aloud. Blank uses the system default voice.

settings.label: Read-Aloud Rate
settings.description: Speech rate multiplier for read-aloud (0.5 = half speed, 2 = double).

settings.label: Read-Aloud Pitch
settings.description: Voice pitch multiplier for read-aloud (1 = default).

settings.label: Read-Aloud Scope
settings.description: What read-aloud speaks when triggered.

settings.label: Dictation Language
settings.description: Reserved for future multi-language models. The streaming NeMo Transducer models used for dictation are English-focused, so this is currently unused.

settings.label: Dictation Engine
settings.description: Which speech engine transcribes dictation. sherpa runs downloadable on-device NeMo Transducer models (choose one below). apple-native uses Apple's built-in on-device speech recognition — no download, but the model choice below is ignored.

settings.label: Dictation Model
settings.description: On-device speech model for the sherpa engine (sherpa-onnx / NeMo Transducer), downloaded on first use and cached locally. Nemotron streams frame-by-frame (live partial text, lowest latency); Parakeet TDT is a larger, multilingual model that transcribes per utterance (commits when you pause — no live partial). Ignored when the engine is apple-native.

settings.label: Dictation Auto-Punctuate
settings.description: Reserved for future use. The NeMo Transducer models auto-punctuate their output, so this is currently unused.

settings.label: Read-Aloud Shortcut
settings.description: Keyboard shortcut to start/pause read-aloud.

settings.label: Dictation Shortcut
settings.description: Keyboard shortcut to toggle dictation.
